vocab.meaning: có một khoảng thời gian cực kỳ vui vẻ
vocab.example: I had a whale of a time capturing the sunrise over the rice terraces last summer; it was truly exhilarating.

vocab.meaning: kết hợp được ưu điểm của cả hai thứ
vocab.example: Living in a high-rise gives me the best of both worlds: urban convenience and stunning aerial views for my photography.

vocab.meaning: thỏa mãn chính xác nhu cầu hoặc mong muốn
vocab.example: A well-composed shot of a misty valley really hits the spot when I'm looking for some creative inspiration.

vocab.meaning: nỗ lực vượt mức mong đợi
vocab.example: I'm willing to go the extra mile, like hiking for hours in the dark, just to snap the perfect shot of the stars.

vocab.meaning: khiến ai đó vô cùng ngạc nhiên hoặc phấn khích
vocab.example: The sheer scale of the Grand Canyon blew my mind, and I spent the whole day trying to capture its magnitude on camera.

vocab.meaning: trở thành tâm điểm, nổi bật nhất
vocab.example: While the architecture was nice, the vibrant sunset in the background really stole the show in that particular photograph.
Sometimes I move at a snail's pace when I'm exploring a scenic viewpoint, as I want to find the perfect angle for every shot.

vocab.meaning: để mắt tới, canh chừng hoặc tìm kiếm
vocab.example: I always keep an eye out for interesting light patterns that might make a mundane view look extraordinary.

vocab.meaning: hiếm khi, năm thì mười họa
vocab.example: You only get that perfect combination of clear skies and low mist once in a blue moon, so you have to be ready.
Photographing serene mountain views is my favorite way to recharge my batteries after a stressful week at work.
